name: @postman-cse/onboarding-bootstrap
description: Bootstrap Postman workspaces, specs, and collections from OpenAPI.

scripts.bundle: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist',{recursive:true,force:true})" && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node24 --format=cjs --alias:jsonc-parser=jsonc-parser/lib/esm/main.js --alias:punycode=punycode/ --define:__SEA_VERSION__=undefined --outfile=dist/index.cjs && esbuild src/main.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node24 --format=cjs --alias:jsonc-parser=jsonc-parser/lib/esm/main.js --alias:punycode=punycode/ --define:__SEA_VERSION__=undefined --outfile=dist/action.cjs && esbuild src/cli.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node24 --format=cjs --alias:jsonc-parser=jsonc-parser/lib/esm/main.js --alias:punycode=punycode/ --define:__SEA_VERSION__=undefined --banner:js="#!/usr/bin/env node" --outfile=dist/cli.cjs && node -e "if(process.platform!=='win32')require('node:fs').chmodSync('dist/cli.cjs',0o755)" && node -e "const {spawnSync}=require('node:child_process');const result=spawnSync(process.execPath,['--trace-deprecation','dist/cli.cjs','--help'],{encoding:'utf8'});if(result.status!==0||result.stderr.includes('[DEP0040]')){process.stderr.write(result.stderr);process.exit(1)}"
scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run bundle
scripts.verify:dist: npm run build && npm run verify:dist:assert
